key_findings: P2: syncEngine.download.test.ts has no conflict-copy branch tests (header claims coverage but mock uses 'lww')
P2: Repeat sync silently overwrites unresolved conflictCopy with new snapshot
P2: double `as unknown as Note` assertion in _applyConflictCopy masks shape mismatch risk
P2: E2E Test 5 does not verify note content was replaced by conflictCopy.content
P2: conflictSourceId set to note ID (not device ID) — semantic mismatch with type comment
clean_checks: Migration three-step ALTER sequence is correct for BOOLEAN→JSONB with NOT NULL+DEFAULT
conflictResolvers.ts is a pure module (no Dexie/Supabase/React imports)
No stale closure risk in Zustand (saveNote is a stable reference)
fieldMap double-mapping is redundant but not harmful (same output either way)
NoteConflictDialog null guard for conflictCopy at click time is correct
ISO 8601 string comparison is valid for UTC timestamps
IDB test isolation via Playwright browser context is correct (no notes pollution between tests)
No XSS risk in conflict content display (text node, not innerHTML)
